# CloudDownload

## Tags
import

## Categories
arrows, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cloud-download)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CloudDownload;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CloudDownload { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
